name: Claude Terminal
postCreateCommand: npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code@latest && pip install fastapi uvicorn[standard] websockets pydantic
postStartCommand: npx --yes @anthropic-ai/claude-code auth login --console 2>/dev/null; echo 'Claude Code ready. Run: uvicorn backend.server:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8080 --reload'
